title: Chambers Global Guide 2025 recognizes McCarthy Tétrault as International Market Leaders
content:
## Chambers Global Guide 2025 recognizes McCarthy Tétrault as International Market Leaders
McCarthy Tétrault has been named a leading firm in the Chambers Global Guide 2025 , recognizing our expertise in providing outstanding cross-border business law advice. The firm received more total combined Band 1 practice area and lawyer rankings, and had more lawyers and practice areas recognized in the guide than any other Canadian firm.
In total, McCarthy Tétrault received:
- 12 Band 1 lawyer rankings
- 14 Band 1 practice and industry area rankings
- 97 total lawyer rankings
- 22 practice and industry area rankings
“McCarthy Tétrault provides strategic and innovative solutions that empower our clients to succeed, in Canada and internationally,” said Sunil Kapur , CEO. “This recognition highlights our firm’s profound expertise in industries where Canada remains a global leader and affirms the confidence our clients place in our capabilities.”
The firm received Band 1 rankings in the following areas:
- Competition/Antitrust
- Disputes (International & Cross-Border)
- Information Technology
- Intellectual Property: Litigation
- International & Cross-Border Transactions
- International Trade/WTO
- Mining (International & Cross-Border)
- Projects: PPP & Infrastructure
A full list of the firm’s top-ranked lawyers can be found on our website.

### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information on McCarthy Tétrault or any of the above, please contact media@mccarthy.ca .
